reason: This is a poetic/philosophical tweet about being kind with words, saying 'Let your letters fall as roses upon people, if they don't have a pleasant fragrance to make them happy, don't let them have thorns that hurt them.' Contains no ISIS-related content.
original_post: اجعل حروفك تهبط وردا على الخلق فان لم يكن لها شذا طيبا يسعدهم فلا تجعل لها اشواكا تؤلمهم ♡♡ فﺍﺧﺘﺭ ﻛﻠﻤﺎﺗﻚ ♡...
